nameMeanings.name: Goode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of   Good  . This name has been used in Ireland since the 16th century.
Possibly an Americanized form of Dutch   Goede  .

variants.name: Good
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English gode ‘good’ (Old English gōd).

English: from the Middle English personal name Gode, representing either Old English Goda (male) or Gode (female), in part a byname and in part a short form of various compound names with the first element gōd, or perhaps a pet form of Old French names in God- such as Godfrey .
Americanized form (translation into English) of German Gut and Guth , or Dutch Goed and Goede .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William Goode was born in 1440, in Whitstone, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom as the son of William Goode. He married Joan Whitson in 1466, in Whitstone, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1475, in Whitby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: William Goode est né en 1440, à Whitstone, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de William Goode. Il a épousé Joan Whitson en 1466, à Whitstone, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1475, à Whitby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: William Goode(은)는 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 휘츠톤에서 William Goode의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1466년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 휘츠톤에서 Joan Whitson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 휘트비에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: William Goode родился в 1440 г. в местности уицтоун, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали William Goode. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Whitson в 1466 г. в местности уицтоун, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1475 г. в местности уитби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.
